info.name: EDU STACK RESTful API - Complete
info.description:
# 🎓 EDU STACK Complete API Documentation

This comprehensive collection covers all endpoints in the EDU STACK microservice including:

- **Authentication & Authorization**
- **School Management**
- **Student & Staff Management**
- **Class & Subject Management**
- **Attendance Tracking**
- **Timetable Management**
- **Exam & CBT System**
- **Accounting & Finance**
- **Notifications**
- **System Settings**

## 🔐 Authentication
Most endpoints require authentication. Use the login endpoint to get a token, which will be automatically set in the environment variable `token`.

## 🏫 Multi-School Support
The system supports multiple schools. Make sure to use the correct `schoolId` in your requests.

## 📊 Pagination
Many list endpoints support pagination with `page` and `limit` query parameters.

request.description: Initialize the system with the first super admin user. This should be called only once when setting up the system.
Login with email/username and password. Returns user data and JWT token.

body.raw:
{
    "email": "teacher@school.com",
    "password": "123456",
    "username": "teacher1",
    "name": "John Teacher",
    "phone": ["1234567890"],
    "address": "123 School St",
    "schoolId": "{{schoolId}}",
    "role": "teacher",
    "designation": "Math Teacher",
    "dob": "1985-05-15",
    "salary": 50000,
    "joining_date": "2024-01-01",
    "gender": "male",
    "isActive": true,
    "qualification": "Master's in Mathematics"
}

request.description: Register a new staff member (teacher, admin, finance, librarian)

{
    "email": "student@school.com",
    "password": "123456",
    "username": "student1",
    "schoolId": "{{schoolId}}",
    "classId": "{{classId}}",
    "sectionId": "{{sectionId}}",

    "gender": "female",
    "dob": "2010-04-15",
    "phone": "0987654321",
    "address": "456 Student Ave",
    "admission_date": "2024-09-01",
    "religion": "Christianity",
    "blood_group": "O+",
    "father_name": "Mr. Parent",
    "mother_name": "Mrs. Parent",
    "father_occupation": "Engineer",
    "mother_occupation": "Doctor",
    "isActive": true,
    "guardian_name": "Guardian Name",
    "guardian_phone": ["1234567890"],
    "guardian_email": "guardian@email.com",
    "guardian_username": "guardian1",
    "guardian_password": "123456"
}

body.raw:

    "title": "Important Announcement",
    "message": "School will be closed tomorrow due to weather conditions.",

Check if system has been initialized (Public endpoint)
Get all fee categories for school

    "name": "Updated Tuition Fee",
    "description": "Updated monthly tuition fee",
    "amount": 5500,

    "frequency": "monthly"
